task.name: Add provider retry/error classification contract and tests
task.description: Port Sparrow retry/error classification concepts into ai-organ provider layer.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Retryable and non-retryable provider errors are classified by unit tests.
ProviderExecutionError carries normalized code, status, and retry-after metadata.

task.name: Implement provider retry executor
task.description: Wrap provider driver execution in retry policy with diagnostic event emission.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Retry executor retries safe transient failures up to max attempts.
Retry diagnostics include attempt, delay, classification and termination reason.

task.name: Add stream timeout helpers
task.description: Port first-event, idle, and adaptive timeout policy helpers.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Timeout helpers are covered by deterministic tests.
Driver stream paths can consume timeout profiles without live provider calls.

task.name: Port Responses input item builders
task.description: Port message-to-input item, tool follow-up, and assistant replay builders from Sparrow.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Request builder handles plain conversation input items.
Request builder handles tool follow-up input items.
Replay-safe assistant payloads are covered by fixtures.

task.name: Implement Responses continuation state
task.description: Support stateless_replay and stateful_chain modes, including previous_response_id state update.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Stateful chain uses previous response id when safe.
Stateless replay does not depend on previous response id.
Continuation diagnostics are emitted in tests.

task.name: Move OpenAI Responses request construction into driver
task.description: Reduce reliance on the existing adapter by making OpenAIResponsesDriver own request body construction.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Driver buildRequest returns a complete provider request contract.
Existing OpenAI Responses reasoning tests still pass.

task.name: Implement provider diagnostics emitters
task.description: Add model selection, retry, progress, continuation, and request diagnostic emitters.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Diagnostic emitters accept fake sinks in tests.
Diagnostics remain non-user-visible by default.

task.name: Normalize provider responses
task.description: Normalize text, tool calls, usage, stop reason, response id, and progress events.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tool-call responses normalize to stable tool ids/names/input.
Stop reason is normalized to end_turn or tool_use.

task.name: Enhance OpenAI Chat driver
task.description: Port message/tool payload repair, schema cleanup, stream error detection, and request diagnostics.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: OpenAI Chat driver handles dangling tool call repair fixtures.
Unsupported schema keys are stripped or normalized as expected.

task.name: Enhance Anthropic and Claude Code drivers
task.description: Port stream parsing, tool name prefix handling, block finalization, and usage extraction details.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Anthropic stream fixture normalizes text/thinking/tool_use events.
Claude Code driver handles prefixed and unprefixed tool names.

task.name: Execute present config fallback chains
task.description: Make present config fallback chains actionable during provider execution.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Timeout or retry exhaustion can try the next configured fallback model.
Attempted models and fallback_used are tracked.

task.name: End-to-end runtime validation
task.description: Run targeted runtime tests ensuring provider runtime path, diagnostics, and fallback behavior remain integrated.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Existing LLM config, provider runtime, and terminal runtime tests pass.
No ai-core LLM config/provider compatibility facade is restored.
